domain_archetypes.name: mecha evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: mecha signal changes while state context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: state boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: state handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: model regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: model behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: interpretable operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: interpretable output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
